1000631722.english: I have some good news to share. The Horde leader just joined the fight. So don't worry too much.
1000631722.korean: 여기 좋은 소식이 있어서 알려주려고, 방금 호드의 대장이 합세했어. 그러니 너무 걱정 마.

1000631723.english: The tearing sound of the gear mounted by Khan could be heard over the communication.
1000631723.korean: - 통신 너머로 칸이 장착한 기어의 찢어질듯한 구동 음이 들려왔다.

1000631724.english: You must be able to hear that sound, right? Well, I’d love to switch it for you right away, but as you know, Commander, the leader of the Horde is always busy, so communication might be a bit difficult.
1000631724.korean: 저 소리가 들리겠지? 뭐, 나도 마음 같아서는 당장 바꿔주고 싶지만, 사령관도 알다시피 호드의 대장님은 늘 바쁘셔서 통신은 조금 힘들겠군.

1000631725.english: It looks like that Horde captain is planning to wipe out my armory all by himself... but no way.
1000631725.korean: 보아하니 저 호드의 대장님께서 내 무기고를 혼자서 동 낼 생각인가 본데… 어림도 없지.

1000631726.english: Anyway, that's all for the report. Oh! And don't forget we're meeting tonight, Commander.
1000631726.korean: 아무튼 보고는 여기까지. 아! 그리고, 밤에 보기로 한거 잊지 마. 사령관.

1000631727.english: That's a relief... I'm really relieved...

1000631728.english: Mary wiped away her tears with the back of her hand.

1000631729.english: *Sniff*... From the looks of it, things worked out well, right? And, you've been saying "night, night" for a while now; is that some kind of secret promise between the two of you? *Sniff*.
1000631729.korean: 훌쩍… 보아하니 잘 풀린 거 맞죠? 그리고, 아까부터 밤 밤 그러는데 그건 둘만의 약속 같은 건가요? 훌쩍.

1000631730.english: - Pat Mary's head, and keep moving forward while thinking.
1000631730.korean: - 메리의 머리를 쓰다듬어주고, 계속 전진하며 생각한다.

1000631731.english: If Khan has joined forces, it's a different story. The worries are lessened.
1000631731.korean: - 칸이 합세했다면, 이야기가 다르다. 걱정은 덜었다.

1000631732.english: My heart swelled with emotion, so I looked up. But…

1000631733.english: Wait, isn't that your brother's face?

1000631734.english: Just as Mary said, my face was plastered all over the building's screens, and the words 'Wanted' were clearly written below the photos.
1000631734.korean: - 메리의 말대로 건물 스크린 곳곳에는 내 얼굴이 박혀있었고, 사진 아래에는 '지명수배'라는 단어가 또렷하게 적혀있었다.

1000631736.english: Machina has started searching for us in earnest. The agents will follow us even more relentlessly now.
1000631736.korean: 마키나가 본격적으로 우릴 찾기 시작했어요. 이제 요원들이 더 집요하게 따라붙을 거예요.

1000631737.english: May I take a look around a bit, Commander?
1000631737.korean: 제가 조금 둘러보고 와도 될까요, 사령관님?

1000631739.english: Hresvelgr disappeared between the buildings. Concerned about the stares around him, he lowered his head as he tried to walk, but he ended up making eye contact with a bioroid.
1000631739.korean: - 흐레스벨그는 건물 사이로 사라졌다. 주변의 시선이 신경쓰여 고개를 숙이고 길을 가려는데 한 바이오로이드와 눈이 마주치고 말았다.

1000631741.english: Coco, who had a surprised expression, looked back and forth between my face and the wanted poster, then slumped down on the spot.
1000631741.korean: - 놀란 표정을 하고 있던 코코는 내 얼굴과 지명수배 영상을 번갈아 보더니, 그 자리에 주저앉아버렸다.

1000631743.english: I was just on my way to Mars... Please save me...
1000631743.korean: 저는 그저 화성에 가던 길이었을 뿐인데… 제발 살려주세요…

1000631745.english: Hey, what is the dream you are hoping for?
1000631745.korean: 있지, 네가 바라고 있는 꿈은 무엇이니?

1000631746.english: As she did so, Mary brushed her hands in the air, and in an instant, the Milky Way and stars appeared before her eyes.
1000631746.korean: - 그러며 메리는 공중에 붓질을 하더니 순식간에 눈앞에 은하수들과 별들이 나타났다.

1000631748.english: I will definitely contact you someday when I arrive on Mars. Thank you, unnie.
1000631748.korean: 언젠가 제가 화성에 도착하면, 꼭 연락드릴게요. 고마워요 언니.

1000631749.english: Ugh... It's hard to avoid the citizens' eyes. If I don't get out of the city center quickly, I'll be caught in no time.
1000631749.korean: 우으… 시민들의 눈을 피하긴 힘들어요, 얼른 도심에서 벗어나지 않으면 금방 잡혀버리고 말거예요.

1000631750.english: Follow me, brother. I will guide you to the empty spaces of the city.
1000631750.korean: 날 따라와요 오라버니. 도시의 빈 공간으로 안내할게요.

1000631751.english: - The way to the empty spaces of the city. We walked in silence for a long time.
1000631751.korean: - 도시의 빈 공간으로 가는 길. 우린 한참을 말없이 걸었다.

1000631752.english: However, the place where I am standing right now looks quite familiar.
1000631752.korean: - 그런데 지금 서 있는 이 장소는 꽤 낯이 익다.

1000631753.english: This is the place where I spent happy times with Vanilla.
1000631753.korean: - 여긴 바닐라와 함께 행복한 시간을 보내던 곳이다.

1000631754.english: The playground where she confessed, the tree-lined street where we walked with autumn leaves falling—they were all here.
1000631754.korean: - 그녀가 고백한 놀이터, 그녀와 걷던 가을 낙엽 지던 가로수길, 모두 여기 있었다.

1000631756.english: Thank you for always working so hard to support our family of three.
1000631756.korean: 항상 저희 세 식구를 먹여 살리기 위해 열심히 일하시느라 수고하십니다.

1000631758.english: Hey... what are you thinking about right now, big brother?
1000631758.korean: 저기... 오라버니는 지금 무슨 생각 하고 있어요?

1000631759.english: - Even though it was Machina's illusion, during my time living here, I…
1000631759.korean: - 비록 마키나의 환상이었다 해도, 이곳에서의 생활하는 동안 나는….

1000631761.english: Mary stops in her tracks and looks up at me. Her golden eyes sparkle in the sunlight.
1000631761.korean: - 발걸음을 멈추고 날 올려다보는 메리. 햇살을 받은 메리의 황금색 눈동자가 반짝인다.

1000631762.english: Brother? Were you truly happy here?

1000631763.english: Is that… because I was born in Bismarck? And… I’m also a little curious.
1000631763.korean: 그건… 제가 비스마르크에서 태어났기 때문일까요? 그리고… 조금 궁금하기도 하고요.

1000631765.english: Even if it was a false daily life…

1000631767.english: - Even if that was a false daily life, I…

1000631768.english: Um... underwear... it doesn't fit anymore... so I'll get a bigger one...
1000631768.korean: 응… 속옷… 이제 맞지 않아서… 더 큰 걸로…

1000631769.english: Haha, this guy only has a big chest!
1000631769.korean: 하하, 이 녀석 가슴만 큰 주제에!

1000631770.english: I'm sick of this false daily life.

1000631772.english: Huh? I don't know what you mean by that...

1000631774.english: I must leave the memories here and go, if only for the sake of the people most precious to me. To where May, who looks down on me, and the cold Night Angel are.
1000631774.korean: - 추억은 여기 두고, 가장 소중한 사람들을 위해서라도 난 가야 한다. 날 깔보는 메이와 쌀쌀맞은 나이트앤젤이 있는 곳으로.

1000631775.english: What? Yes! I don't intend to go straight into the center, so let's take a slight detour.
1000631775.korean: 네? 네! 중심부로 바로 들어갈 생각은 없으니까. 조금 돌아서 가도록 해요.

1000631776.english: It was good that we got off to a good start, but we didn't get far before people appeared to block our path.
1000631776.korean: - 기운차게 출발한 건 좋았지만, 얼마 가지 못해 우리의 앞을 가로막는 자들이 나타났다.

1000631779.english: We have dispatched to capture you!

1000631781.english: I'll arrest you with fiery justice!

1000631782.english: I couldn't help but be taken aback by the 180-degree change in her appearance, as she had always been cool and chic in upholding the rules of the Orca.
1000631782.korean: - 항상 쿨하고 시크하게 오르카호의 법도를 지키던 그녀의 180도 달라진 모습에 당황할 수밖에 없었다.

1000631783.english: Right, my name is Miss Safety...

1000631784.english: And another name is Warrior Police.
1000631784.korean: 그리고 또 다른 이름은 용사 경찰이다.

1000631785.english: Brother? What should I do now?

1000631786.english: Hoho? If you have no intention of letting yourself be captured so easily, I’ll have no choice but to teach you a lesson… Here I go!
1000631786.korean: 호오? 순순히 잡혀 줄 생각이 없다면, 호된 맛을 보여줄 수밖에 없지… 간다!

1000631793.english: The place where I lived… no, the place where I had my fantasies.
1000631793.korean: 내가 살던… 아니. 내가 환상을 보던 곳이군.

1000631794.english: It's nothing, just keep guiding me.
